zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Ursula Meade於1558年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾希欽時，她的父親Sir Richard Meade43歲，母親Lady Margaret Gouldhurst43歲。她和John Meade至少有3個女兒。她於1931年住在美國華盛頓華盛頓。她去世於1604年10月8日在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文劍橋大學默里 哈文享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Ursula Meade于1558年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾希欽时，她的父亲Sir Richard Meade43岁，母亲Lady Margaret Gouldhurst43岁。她和John Meade至少有3个女儿。她于1931年住在美国华盛顿華盛頓。她去世于1604年10月8日在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文劍橋大學默里 哈文享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰米德萊可。

nameMeanings.name: Meade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: habitational name from Midheach, the Gaelic name of County Meath in Ireland. Its Anglicized forms are now indistinguishable from those of the English name Mead .

variants.name: Mead
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a meadow, from Middle English mede ‘meadow’ (Old English mǣd), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places so named, such as Meads in Harford (Devon).
perhaps from Middle English mede ‘mead, alcoholic drink of fermented honey and water’, possibly denoting one who was fond of the drink or who made or sold mead. Compare Meader .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ursula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Ursula, a diminutive of ursa ‘(she-)bear’. This was the name of a 4th-century saint martyred at Cologne with a number of companions, traditionally said to have been eleven thousand, but more probably just eleven, the exaggeration being due to a misreading of a diacritic mark in an early manuscript. This name was moderately popular in the 16th century, but its use in the English-speaking world today is selective. A more recent influence has been the film actress Ursula Andress ( b. 1936 in Switzerland).

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Ursula Meade was born in 1558, in Hitchin, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Meade, was 43 and her mother, Lady Margaret Gouldhurst, was 43. She had at least 3 daughters with John Meade. She lived in Washington, District of Columbia, United States in 1931. She died on 8 October 1604, in New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 46, and was buried in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Ursula Meade est née en 1558, à Hitchin, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Meade, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Gouldhurst, avait 43 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 filles avec John Meade. Elle a vécu à Washington, District de Columbia, États-Unis en 1931. Elle est décédée le 8 octobre 1604, à New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Ursula Meade 1558 in Hitchin, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Meade 43 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret Gouldhurst 43. Sie hatte mit John Meade mindestens 3 Töchter. 1931 hat sie in Washington, District of Columbia, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb am 8. Oktober 1604 im Alter von 46 Jahren in New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Ursula Meade è nata il nel 1558 nel Hitchin, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Richard Meade, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret Gouldhurst, aveva 43 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figlie con John Meade. Vissuto a Washington, Distretto della Colombia, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1931. Morì il 8 ottobre 1604, nel New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Ursula Meadeが1558年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアヒトチンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Meadeは43歳，母Lady Margaret Gouldhurstは43歳であった。彼女はJohn Meadeとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1931年にはアメリカ合衆国ワシントンD.C.ワシュイントンに住んでいた。彼女は1604年10月8日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニュー ヘイベンで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary's Church, Watford, Hertfordshire: 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓퍼드 스트 마이'스 c후르치

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Ursula Meade(이)가 1558년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 히트친에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Meade(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret Gouldhurst(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 John Meade(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1931년도에 미국 워싱턴 D.C. 와신그턴에서 살았다. 그녀는 1604년 10월 8일 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴 하븐에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Ursula Meade nasceu em 1558, em Hitchin, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Meade, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Gouldhurst, tinha 43 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhas com John Meade. Ela viveu em Washington, Distrito da Colombia, Estados Unidos da América em 1931. Ela faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1604, em New Haven, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Ursula Meade родилась в 1558 г. в местности хичин, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Meade было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Gouldhurst, 43. У неё было по крайней мере 3 дочери от John Meade. Она жила в местности вашингтон, Вашингтон, Соединенные штаты в 1931 году. Она умерла 8 октября 1604 г. в местности ню хавен, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Ursula Meade nació en 1558, en Hitchin, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Meade, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Gouldhurst, tenía 43 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con John Meade. Vivió en Washington, Distrito de Columbia, Estados Unidos en 1931. Murió el 8 de octubre de 1604, en New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
